image_analyses.description: The image shows a couple in traditional Indian wedding attire standing together outdoors.
A couple in traditional Indian wedding attire, with the man wearing a white sherwani and turban, and the woman in a pink and white lehenga, standing together in a forest setting.

The image shows a couple in traditional Indian wedding attire, with the man wearing a white sherwani and the woman in a beautiful lehenga. They are standing in a natural setting with trees in the background.
A photo of a couple in traditional Indian wedding attire, with the man wearing a white sherwani and turban, and the woman wearing a white and pink lehenga with intricate embroidery and jewelry.

The image shows a couple in traditional Indian wedding attire, with the man wearing a white sherwani and turban, and the woman wearing a pink and white lehenga. They are sitting together, with their heads close.
A photo of a couple in traditional Indian wedding attire, with the man wearing a white sherwani and turban, and the woman wearing a white and gold sari with intricate embroidery.

The image shows a woman in traditional Indian attire, likely a bride, sitting and looking down. She wears a red and gold sari with green accents, adorned with gold jewelry including a headpiece, earrings, necklace, and nose ring. Her dark hair is styled up with a gold hairpiece. The background is blurred, showing a grassy area and a white surface.
A man in traditional Indian attire placing a decorative headpiece on a woman's forehead while she smiles, seated on an ornate chair with a table of offerings in front of them.

The image shows a man and woman in traditional Indian attire, likely during a wedding ceremony. The woman is wearing a red sari with gold accents and the man is wearing a white shirt with pink and gold pants and hat. They are sitting on a couch with a table in front of them that has various items on it, including flowers and what appears to be a plate of sweets. The man is putting a necklace or headpiece on the woman's head.

The image shows a man and woman in traditional Indian wedding attire. The woman is wearing a red sari with gold accents, while the man is dressed in a white shirt and red pants with a matching hat. They are sitting on a couch, with the man feeding the woman a piece of food.
